channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Younger Generations' Cybersecurity Attitudes Exposed: 47% of Gen Z and 46% of Millennials Had Passwords Hacked, Yet They're Supposedly Most Aware of Hardware Security Keys - A Report by Yubico
item.description: Yubico's latest annual report reveals that despite being supposedly more aware of hardware security keys, 47% of Gen Z and 46% of Millennials claim to have had passwords hacked. The report also highlights the overconfidence and lack of cybersecurity education in these demographics, with nearly half reporting they are more concerned about their personal data than company or workplace data.
item.dc:creator: Major Digest
